reviewer_prior_involvement_notes: This session previously served as review-1 for the round-1 fix unit in this stage, which is a review role and not captured by the schema's direction_synthesis/breakdown/design enum. There is no prior implementation, fix authorship, direction synthesis, breakdown, or design involvement with the FINAL fix unit under review.
residual_risks: R1: seed receipts in ResumeIdempotencyTests use incrementing call_budget (before: seq-1, after: seq) opposite to production decrement semantics; the predicate under test only uses node + review_unit_id, and a production cross-probe confirms real receipts are recognized, so there is no behavioral impact.

R2: FX1 string-level enumeration in ShellSafeInvocationTests covers 5 of the 6 runner-reachable placeholder commands in agents/registry.yaml, missing claude_glm.embedded_read_only_review_command (shape-identical to covered cases); the bookkeeper independently verified all 6, and the real execution probes pass in both production contexts.
Trailing whitespace exists in the review range but only in raw Grok review artifacts and an evidence diff file; per AGENTS.md these are not rewritten for Markdown hard-break normalization.
